diagrams.title: PMF vs CDF for Dice Roll
diagrams.description: Shows probability mass function as vertical bars and cumulative distribution function as step function
elements: PMF: bars at x=1,2,3,4,5,6 each with height 1/6
CDF: steps jumping by 1/6 at each integer

diagrams.title: Binomial Distribution Shapes
diagrams.description: Shows how binomial distribution changes shape with varying n and p
elements: As n increases, distribution approaches normal (CLT)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize effect of parameters on distribution shape

diagrams.title: Poisson Approximation to Binomial
diagrams.description: When n is large and p is small, binomial approaches Poisson with λ=np
elements: Compare bars - they are nearly identical
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to use Poisson simplification
